author: y4rr
content: Delivered: trial count scaled from 1000 to 10000 per schema in release builds (build-mode-aware constant; debug stays at 1000 for fast cargo test). 5 schemas × 10 000 trials = 50 000 sampled completions, all parse + validate against their schema. Release-mode wall-clock 19.12 s. Debug-mode (1000/schema) 8.68 s for the full grammar::json_schema test suite (10 tests). Clippy clean. Commit 9b87d105.
